steps.title: Require definition and example
steps.content: The student wants both an explanation of "flauna" and an example. The relevant notes define the term as a combination of "flora" and "fauna" for plant-animal hybrids and give examples from Liu's paintings.

steps.title: Reject incomplete note use
steps.content: Choice A gives only the word origin. Choice C names Nectar but does not explain what flauna means. Choice D mentions paintings but does not clearly explain the plant-animal hybrid idea. The option that defines the term and gives the parrot-with-leaves example satisfies both goals. The answer is B.
